dependencyHandoff.parallelReadyNextWave: none until RM-001 proves the copy action shape
dependencyHandoff.notesOnBlockers: RM-002 should reuse the final interaction contract from RM-001, not race it

items.item: Add one-click copy action to the share dialog

backlog.capabilityGap: share dialog exposes invite URL but not direct copy action
backlog.whyNow: it removes the first visible collaboration friction in the beta flow
backlog.successSignal: users can copy the invite link with one click
backlog.entryConstraints: no backend changes, no share dialog redesign
backlog.openRisks: clipboard failure copy may still need follow-up UX
backlog.firstPlanningQuestion: can this stay a tiny-design patch without changing contracts?
backlog.requiredContextToLoad: current share dialog, current invite URL source, existing tests
backlog.whyReadyNow: the ask is narrow, the evidence is real, and the dependency surface is already known

items.item: Add copied-state feedback to the share dialog

backlog.capabilityGap: invite links lack durable copied-state feedback after action completion

backlog.parkedReason: collaboration analytics is premature before Stage 1 and 2 prove usage
backlog.triggerToReopen: repeated invite usage after beta activation
